root_text.an5.210:1.1: “Pañcime, bhikkhave, ādīnavā muṭṭhassatissa asampajānassa niddaṁ okkamayato.
root_text.an5.210:1.3: Dukkhaṁ supati, dukkhaṁ paṭibujjhati, pāpakaṁ supinaṁ passati, devatā na rakkhanti, asuci muccati.
root_text.an5.210:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā muṭṭhassatissa asampajānassa niddaṁ okkamayato.
root_text.an5.210:2.1: Pañcime, bhikkhave, ānisaṁsā upaṭṭhitassatissa sampajānassa niddaṁ okkamayato.
root_text.an5.210:2.3: Sukhaṁ supati, sukhaṁ paṭibujjhati, na pāpakaṁ supinaṁ passati, devatā rakkhanti, asuci na muccati.
root_text.an5.210:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ānisaṁsā upaṭṭhitassatissa sampajānassa niddaṁ okkamayato”ti.

translation_text.an5.210:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five drawbacks of falling asleep unmindful and unaware.
translation_text.an5.210:1.3: You sleep badly and wake miserably. You have bad dreams. The deities don’t protect you. And you emit semen.
translation_text.an5.210:1.4: These are the five drawbacks of falling asleep unmindful and unaware.
translation_text.an5.210:2.1: There are these five benefits of falling asleep mindful and aware.
translation_text.an5.210:2.3: You sleep at ease and wake happily. You don’t have bad dreams. The deities protect you. And you don’t emit semen.
translation_text.an5.210:2.4: These are the five benefits of falling asleep mindful and aware.”
